name: Stuffed Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 1 (10 oz.) package frozen chopped spinach (thawed and drained)
2 cups ricotta cheese (or small curd cottage cheese)
6 ounces fresh mushrooms, sliced and sautéed
3 slices of moist bread, torn into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the manicotti and drain.
2. Mix together onion, thawed spinach, bouillon, garlic, thyme, ricotta, beaten eggs, Parmesan cheese, and half of the sautéed mushrooms.
3. Fill the manicotti shells with the spinach mixture.
4. Arrange the filled shells in a greased 9x13 baking dish.
5. Pour tomato sauce over the manicotti and remaining sautéed mushrooms.
6. Sprinkle with oregano and cover with shredded Mozzarella cheese.
7. Cover and bake at 350 degrees until hot and bubbly, about 25 minutes.
ALTERNATE FILLING:
1. Brown the meat in a skillet and drain.
2. Mix the browned meat with all other ingredients.
3. Stuff the manicotti shells with the meat mixture.
4. Proceed with steps 4-7 as in the first recipe.
